Manual and auto update flows share one applyImprovement mutation boundary
Managed generated section and protected resource strategies separate state merge from section injection
Persisted rejected patterns merge from disk and suppress future matching suggestions
Documented config/prompt precedence and refused inline edit boundary

single canonical mutation boundary

summary: Adopt a merge ADR: reducer owns conflict resolution, inbox and strategy are inputs/projections, and no raw writer silently wins.
Operator decisions should win only as structured records; the reducer owns rendering and status projection.
Treat key-questions as a generated projection, not as the user/operator injection surface.
Surface unresolved question disagreements as question_conflict events and dashboard rows instead of silent markdown rewrites.
Document question conflict precedence in the reducer/registry contract before implementation.

Answer: neither inbox-wins nor reducer-wins is safe. Use merge ADR: immutable inbox/decision records feed canonical registry state, reducer resolves conflicts deterministically, and key-questions is only the rendered view.

event.label: freeze precedence contract before reducer rewrite
